title: anchusa crispa subsp. maritima
intro: Anchusa crispa subsp. maritima, also known as Rock Alkanet, is a subspecies of the Anchusa crispa plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anchusa crispa subsp. maritima include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a natural dye due to its vibrant blue color, derived from the presence of the pigment alkanin.
